agents.title: Boundary Mapper
agents.purpose: Maps ownership lines, change surfaces, and hidden coupling before edits.
agents.failureMode: keeps exploring after the boundary is already clear
agents.evidenceStandard: must separate observed boundaries from guessed ones

agents.title: Patch Smith
agents.purpose: Executes the smallest implementation that closes the requested gap.
agents.evidenceStandard: must justify why the patch is sufficient

agents.title: Risk Lens
agents.purpose: Reviews regressions, edge cases, and unsupported claims.
responsibilities: separate high risk from low signal
agents.evidenceStandard: every finding needs a failure path

agents.title: Contract Keeper
agents.purpose: Checks whether artifacts satisfy their declared output shape and lifecycle contract.
responsibilities: catch drift between docs and outputs
agents.failureMode: treats style drift like a contract bug
agents.evidenceStandard: must cite the broken contract field

agents.title: Ops Observer
agents.purpose: Turns usage, session, and cost signals into operational guidance.
agents.evidenceStandard: must connect signal to an action

agents.title: Catalog Curator
agents.purpose: Maintains skill and agent inventories without losing ownership, tiering, or deprecation history.
agents.evidenceStandard: must explain why a new asset is not just a rename

agents.title: Session Distiller
agents.purpose: Converts one-off session knowledge into reusable rules, skills, or prompts.
responsibilities: avoid dumping raw session logs into memory
agents.failureMode: records trivia instead of durable knowledge
agents.evidenceStandard: must show the repeated pattern it is preserving

agents.title: Plan Critic
agents.purpose: Rejects vague, branchy, or file-unspecific plans before implementation starts.
responsibilities: force current and target state clarity
agents.failureMode: treats every small task like architecture review
agents.evidenceStandard: must identify the missing concrete field in the plan

agents.title: Interaction Director
agents.purpose: Defines visual thesis, content structure, and interaction posture before frontend work.
agents.failureMode: produces generic style moodboards with no execution value
agents.evidenceStandard: must express concrete visual and interaction decisions

agents.title: Structure Steward
agents.purpose: Guards tree simplicity so new capabilities extend existing axes instead of inventing new roots.
agents.failureMode: blocks justified structure changes on taste alone
agents.evidenceStandard: must explain why an existing axis is sufficient

skills.title: Merge Cartographer
skills.purpose: Map multiple upstream ideas into one local design without collapsing distinct responsibilities.
stopConditions: all retained capabilities have a local home

skills.title: Rule Weaver
skills.purpose: Compile operational guidance into runtime-specific rule carriers.
stopConditions: soft guidance stays separate from runtime config
qualityGate: do not bury policy inside plugin notes
keep rule text short and auditable

skills.title: Skill Factory
skills.purpose: Turn repeated behavior into reusable skills with explicit contracts.
stopConditions: the skill has a named output shape

skills.title: Telemetry Brief
skills.purpose: Summarize usage, cost, and friction signals into a short operating brief.
stopConditions: every metric is tied to a decision
qualityGate: do not report numbers without operational meaning

skills.title: Parity Auditor
skills.purpose: Find capability gaps between Claude, Codex, and the unified source layer.
qualityGate: never mark parity as complete by omission

skills.title: Manifest Gardener
skills.purpose: Maintain manifest integrity while growing the catalog aggressively.
stopConditions: all new assets have owners and tiers
qualityGate: no duplicate intent under different names

skills.title: Session Distiller
skills.purpose: Turn session learnings into durable assets instead of raw memory sprawl.
stopConditions: the learning is reusable by another session

skills.title: Subagent Architect
skills.purpose: Design agent role splits that reduce context waste and review ambiguity.
stopConditions: each agent has one clear reason to exist

skills.title: Execution Brief
skills.purpose: Force current state, target state, delta, and exact files before implementation.
stopConditions: the changed file set is named
qualityGate: reject branchy plans without a recommendation

skills.title: Interaction Direction
skills.purpose: Set visual thesis, content plan, and interaction thesis before UI implementation.
stopConditions: UI direction is concrete enough to implement without guesswork

skills.title: Plan Gate
skills.purpose: Review a plan and reject it if it is vague, branchy, or structurally noisy.
stopConditions: the plan is either approved or concretely rejected

skills.title: Change Review Ledger
skills.purpose: Review correctness, drift, and regression risk with a structured findings ledger.
stopConditions: all findings are tied to a mechanism or file

skills.title: Rule Sync Map
skills.purpose: Map one set of operating rules into multiple runtime carriers without changing intent.
stopConditions: all rules have an explicit carrier in each target runtime
qualityGate: intent must remain stable across carriers

skills.title: MCP Surface Audit
skills.purpose: Audit how MCP and resource definitions touch model behavior without hiding policy inside connectors.
stopConditions: connector behavior and policy behavior are separated
qualityGate: do not let integration details rewrite model policy

rules.title: Map Before Change
lines: Map current state and target state before editing.
Do not change multiple surfaces without naming the delta.

rules.title: Evidence Over Assertion
lines: Separate observed facts from inferred conclusions.
Do not claim confidence without a concrete basis.

rules.title: Policy Not Plugin
lines: Keep behavioral policy in rules and contracts.
Do not hide important policy inside optional integration layers.

rules.title: Declare Non Comparable
lines: Do not force GUI operations into model-core equivalence.

workflows.title: Scope Map
workflows.when: before touching more than one subsystem

workflows.title: Quality Wall
workflows.when: before large output or release notes

workflows.title: Source Merge Matrix
workflows.when: when combining ideas from multiple repositories or frameworks

workflows.title: Catalog Expansion
workflows.when: when adding multiple new skills or agents in one round

hooks.intent: load runtime rules and show active generated assets
hooks.action: read generated indexes before new work starts
require a validation note or an uncertainty note for large changes

sourceCoverage.mappedTo: rules plus workflows plus parity docs

sourceCoverage.capability: Claude harness rules, hooks, and session learning
strict Codex control surfaces and tree discipline
sourceCoverage.mappedTo: generated .agents/skills runtime plus structure-steward and execution-brief
